reviews.review_msg: Very caring prof, very kind as well. Lecture slides are nice and clear. Class has 2 midterms and 1 final. Along with multiple assignments. I would recommend this prof. Just note that her final exam was a bit brutal as there was a lot to cover so don't CRAM. Following that her assignments can be time consuming so make sure you start earlier.
No show Ro is what I liked to call her. Otherwise pretty easy!
Terrible prof. Missed lectures and never gave our final marks back. Will never take a class with her again

Milad is a great prof.  He is very understanding towards students and makes lectures  fun.  Course material is pretty bland, however Milad keeps it interesting.

Milad was a good lecturer and was funny and engaging. There are iclicker questions in lecture, not for marks, just participationattendance, so try and go to class. He encourages students to participate in class  and is always willing to answer questions and help.  Lots of reading, but usually interesting material. Exams were fair. Overall, great!

He encourages students to participate in class  and is always willing to answer questions and help.  Lots of reading, but usually interesting material. Exams were fair. Overall, great!

Took this class Distance Ed and it was fairly easy. Online discussions are easy marks. Aim to do well on the papers because it will significantly help your grade going into the final. The text book will only really be utilized to study for the final. Like any class, do well on the papers and know the material for the final and you will do very well
taking this course with him won't be easy even though for 100-level it's supposed to be
He's very knowledgeable and philosophical.  His course is not easy, but you learn a lot.
very organized and knowledgeable
Awesome, love the class
He is a retard!!!!! The mid-terms are ridiculously unrelated to the lectures!!! You get good grades depends if he likes you or not...seriously. He is a disgrace to the commuity of teaching.
No Comments

I found Newman very difficult to understand because he did not speak clear and he went through his slides quickly. There are also many assignments in this class including a presentation and three papers. Overall, there is a lot of content to take in and it gets confusing.
Very nice person, however his lectures are quite boring and his tutorials were never organized. Easy exam and fairly easy marker.
horrible....The worst teacher ever. Her voice was kind of annoying so I stopped going to the class.
very passionate, strong speaker, easy exams
Very kind prof.
